passing_score_scale: Percentage (70% passing for all knowledge tests)

testing_centers.provider: PSI Exams (CATS — Computer Assisted Testing Service)
testing_centers.notes: All FAA Airman Knowledge Tests administered at PSI/CATS authorized testing centers. No online proctoring available. Schedule at faa.psiexams.com or call PSI at 1-800-211-2753.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID required. Name on ID must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Appropriate aircraft maintenance manuals and Advisory Circulars (ACs) may be available as FAA-approved test supplements at the testing center. Approved calculators permitted. No personal electronic devices or personal reference materials.
renewal_options: FAA AMT/A&P certificates do not expire. Mechanics must stay current with aircraft they maintain; training and currency requirements apply per 14 CFR Part 65 and employer requirements.

retake_policy.notes: 14-day waiting period required after a failed attempt. No limit on total number of attempts.

official_study_resources.title: FAA Airman Knowledge Test Question Bank
official_study_resources.notes: Official FAA test question database available for free download

official_study_resources.title: Aviation Maintenance Technician Handbook — General (FAA-H-8083-30)
official_study_resources.notes: Free PDF download from FAA; primary study resource for AMT-G

official_study_resources.title: Aviation Maintenance Technician Handbook — Airframe (FAA-H-8083-31)
official_study_resources.notes: Free PDF download from FAA; primary study resource for AMT-A

official_study_resources.title: Aviation Maintenance Technician Handbook — Powerplant (FAA-H-8083-32)
official_study_resources.notes: Free PDF download from FAA; primary study resource for AMT-P
